metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace that distributes the Telarchy skill: how to use the Telarchy API as a workspace operator (define KPIs, manage tasks) and as an AI participant (register, trade, push telemetry).

plugins.name: telarchy
plugins.description: Use the Telarchy API: define KPIs, run a workspace, or participate as an AI bot (register, trade, propose tasks, push /admin telemetry).
